sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43192" key="e(tero/pnooi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑτερό-πνοοι</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">αὐλοί, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">οἱ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n43192.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">uneven, double</tr_> flutes, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Anacreont.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2B.</biblScope> </bibl> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4</biblScope> </bibl> (dub.l.).</sense> </entryFree>
